ogTitle: Wilson Valley vs Wilsons Pocket: Climate Safety

heading: Wilson Valley vs Wilsons Pocket — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilson Valley, Queensland and Wilsons Pocket, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilson Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wilsons Pocket (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilson Valley or Wilsons Pocket safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilson Valley has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Wilsons Pocket scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilson Valley scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Wilsons Pocket scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilson Valley or Wilsons Pocket?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilson Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
